title: The Crowded Vial
description: Mixing, selling, and debunking records all point toward a single pair. Deduce what potion they produce.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing4 and ing6, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing4=R+ (ing4 R?: (sign undetermined)), ing6=R- (ing6 R?: (sign undetermined))
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing4=G+ (ing4 G?: (sign undetermined)), ing6=G- (ing6 G?: (sign undetermined))
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing4=B- (ing4 has B-), ing6=B- (ing6 has B-)
      → SAME sign - → B- resolves.
